channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly-tipping - Alleyway needs CCTV, 26th April
item.description:
Constant flow of fly tipping in this alleyway. This happens weekly and nothing gets done other than the rubbish being cleaned up. Residents who do this need to get fined. The council needs to install CCTV and provide an easier way to arrange bulk collections. I am tired of paying 150£ plus a month in council tax to live in filth

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wishaw Walk, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Constant flow of fly tipping in this alleyway. This happens weekly and nothing gets done other than the rubbish being cleaned up. Residents who do this need to get fined. The council needs to install CCTV and provide an easier way to arrange bulk collections. I am tired of paying 150£ plus a month in council tax to live in filth.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wishaw Walk, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Vases broken Bags of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead

item.title: Hedge overhang on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
There is a hedge far overhanging the pavement, push chairs, wheelchairs are finding it hard to get through the space left on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camilla Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping from residents, 26th April
item.description:
Constant flow of fly tipping in this alleyway. This happens weekly and nothing gets done other than the rubbish being cleaned up. Residents who do this need to get fined. The council needs to install CCTV and provide an easier way to arrange bulk collections. I am tired of paying 150£ plus a month in council tax to live in filth.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pymmes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is da burning, 26th April
item.description:
Loampit Vale outside Asda.Street light is day burning This has been reported previously and is still day birning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Loampit Vale, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aden grove littering, 26th April
item.description:
Same problem every day - these flats don’t have bins give them bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip I’m Lulworth Road, 26th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped between the post box and 20 Lulworth Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: Flyposting street light, 26th April

Offensive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Bricks on pavement, 26th April

item.title: Rubbish bins, 26th April
item.description:
The people have moved out and rubbish bins overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Sandcliff Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London

item.title: Resident using the wheelie bins to block parking spaces, 26th April
item.description:
The residence from 10,18,24 Aitken Road are you there? Bins to block parking spaces this has been reported before but Lewisham council hasn’t done anything about it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Aitken Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 26th April
item.description:
This vehicle has been here for several months The front number plate has been removed Renault Clio Silver GK68 PCV Parked at 127 Colney Hatch Lane N10 1HD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Colney Hatch Lane, Colney Hatch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gulley, 26th April
item.description:
Theere is a blocked gulley outside 2 Morden Street. Please could it be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morden Street, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No bin collection this weekend so far in the Children's Playground., 26th April
item.description:
As above. Children are having to play surrounded by litter of all kinds. People have tried to use the bins but, without tops on the bins, the squirrels foxes have had fun.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out scooter, 26th April
item.description:
There was a burnt out trolley in the middle of the meadows. I’ve collected lots of the bits and put them in the bin, but the main part of it wouldn’t fit so I’ve left it next to the bin for collection. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing again, 26th April
item.description:
Constant problem as detailed many times previously. One idea would be to empty the bin daily???
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mest on boardwalk a trip hazard., 26th April
item.description:
The mesh on the boardwalk has come loose and is a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon, 26th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
